title: International Student Data Platform
description: Architected analytics platform reducing time-to-insight 40% using Express.js (Apollo GraphQL), Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Improved search relevance for 400K+ employers via Meilisearch tuning and Redis caching. Reduced p95 latency 60% with Node.js and Apollo GraphQL optimizations, input validation, and rate limiting. Automated CI with Jest, Playwright, and GitHub Actions — halved pipeline time and doubled releases. Reduced AWS spend $2K/month by right-sizing Docker services and caching background workloads.

title: EdgeDetectr
description: Shipped a full-stack computer vision edge detection platform with 100+ monthly users and 99% uptime. Parallelized 5+ image kernels for 3× CPU speedups using C++, OpenMP, and factory polymorphism. Deployed containerized services on AWS ECS with Docker behind ELB; frontend via AWS Amplify. Architected safeguarded REST API endpoints with fixed-window rate limits in Express.js and Node.js. Developed 30+ responsive components and seamless uploads with JavaScript, React, and Next.js.
